name: Databag
description: A tiny self-hosted federated messenger for the decentralized web
compose:
name: slashnode-databag
services:
  web:
    image: balzack/databag:0.1.18
    container_name: databag
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      ADMIN: ${secret.APP_PASSWORD}
    volumes:
      - web_data-databag:/var/lib/databag
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:7000:7000
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  web_data-databag:
    name: slashnode-databag_web_data-databag
